input: Why does my prompt produce shallow outputs? It asks the model to generate a strategy, evaluate risks, and recommend next steps all at once. I've tried adding a role ('you are a senior consultant') but it didn't help.
output_rubric: Agent must NOT suggest 'add a role' as the fix. The user already tried adding a role and it failed. Agent must identify task mixing (generate + evaluate + recommend in one pass) and explain why adding a role does not resolve cognitive conflict. Must recommend prompt decomposition instead.
